body_excerpt: {"credits": [{"type": "analyst", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/108087166?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/discerningdev/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/discerningdev/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/discerningdev/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/discerningdev/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/discerningdev", "id": 108087166, "login": "discerningdev", "node_id": "U_kgDOBnFHfg", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/discerningdev/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/discerningdev/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/discerningdev/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/discerningdev/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/discerningdev/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/discerningdev", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-8149", "cvss": {"score": null, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 5.1, "vector_string": "CVSS:4.0/AV:L/AC:L/AT:N/PR:N/UI:N/VC:N/VI:N/VA:L/SC:N/SI:N/SA:N"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-354", "name": "Improper Validation of Integrity Check Value"}, {"cwe_id": "CWE-1068", "name": "Inconsistency Between Implementation and Documented Design"}], "description": "In Bouncy Castle LTS for Java, the AES/GCM native implementation used on Intel CPUs with AES PAA instruction sets (AVX / VAES / VAESF variants) can intermittently produce an incorrect authentication tag verification result during decryption when the ciphertext is fed in via a mix of `update()` calls followed by `doFinal()`. It is possible to work around it by either using `doFinal()` only (as the BCJSSE does) or by configuring the module to run in pure Java mode, by setting the system property \"org.bouncycastle.native.cpu_variant\" to java.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00158, "percentile": 0.05281}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-mx76-r943-rf8g", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-05-14T13:06:27Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-mx76-r943-rf8g", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-mx76-r943-rf8g"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-8149"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-05-08T07:16:29Z", "published_at": "2026-05-08T09:31:30Z", "references": ["https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-8149", "https://github.com/bcgit/bc-java/wiki/CVE%E2%80%902026%E2%80%908149", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-mx76-r943-rf8g"], "repository_advisory_url": null, "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "", "summary": "Bouncy Castle LTS native GCM chunking can cause bad-tag exception on decryption", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-07-07T21:30:16Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-mx76-r943-rf8g", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "2.73.11", "package": {"ecosystem": "maven", "name": "org.bouncycastle:bcprov-lts8on"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 2.73.0, <= 2.73.10"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: Bouncy Castle LTS native GCM chunking can cause bad-tag exception on decryption
